NASA’s Artemis II Launch Mission Countdown Begins 3 min read The countdown for NASA’s Artemis II test flight is underway at the agency’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida, with members of the launch team arriving at their consoles inside the Rocco Petrone Launch Control Center.
The onsite countdown clock started ticking down at 4:44 p.m.
